headline: MetLife Q1 Adj. EPS $2.42 Beats $2.27 Estimate, Sales $19.682B Beat $19.477B Estimate.
summary: MetLife (NYSE:MET) reported quarterly earnings of $2.42 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $2.27 by 6.61 percent. This is a 23.47 percent increase over earnings of $1.96 per share from the same period
